name: National Road Golf Course
about: National Road Golf Course features newly renovated indoor golf simulators, providing a space for practice and play. The venue was designed with beginners, seniors, and juniors in mind while still offering a challenge for skilled golfers. It offers affordable simulator sessions at $35 per hour, alongside amenities like a snack bar and the ability to host leagues and special events.
why_golfers_like_it: Newly renovated simulators with modern technology
Designed to be welcoming for all skill levels
Offers leagues and event hosting capabilities
Features a snack bar for refreshments

food_and_drink.notes: Snack bar available with a variety of food options.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rental services are available at the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a snack bar available for food and drinks; BYOB policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulators?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulator round is not specified.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the course was built with juniors in mind and is considered kid-friendly.
